     the Fermi energy is     0.3790 ev

!    total energy              =   -6196.92561389 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000015 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.05509943 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -124371.53408982 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   62764.46799015 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2130.11974276 Ry
